title: Thing Description with AIO Protocol Binding
description: JSON Schema for validating TD instances that employ the AIO WoT Protocol Binding

title.description: The 'title' value is used as a codegen type name, so it should start with an uppercase letter and contain only alphanumeric characters
non-empty name that uniquely identifies this group across all property/action/event group arrays

dov:scaleFactor.description: scale factor to apply to instance values

aov:scaleFactor.description: scale factor to apply to instance values

dov:decimalPlaces.description: number of decimal places of significant precision of instance values

aov:decimalPlaces.description: number of decimal places of significant precision of instance values

dov:scaleFactor.description: scale factor to apply to instance values

aov:scaleFactor.description: scale factor to apply to instance values

dov:decimalPlaces.description: number of decimal places of significant precision of instance values

aov:decimalPlaces.description: number of decimal places of significant precision of instance values

dov:typeRef.description: opaque reference to another type definition (not necessarily in WoT) that is congruent to this definition

aov:typeRef.description: opaque reference to another type definition (not necessarily in WoT) that is congruent to this definition

pattern.description: regular expression that expresses either an ISO 8601 duration or a decimal string

dov:typeRef.description: opaque reference to another type definition (not necessarily in WoT) that is congruent to this structured object definition

aov:typeRef.description: opaque reference to another type definition (not necessarily in WoT) that is congruent to this structured object definition

properties.description: use 'properties' to indicate an object type and define fields for the object

required.description: array of 'properties' keys that indicate properties required to be included in any instance of the object

dov:typeRef.description: opaque reference to another type definition (not necessarily in WoT) that is congruent to this map definition

aov:typeRef.description: opaque reference to another type definition (not necessarily in WoT) that is congruent to this map definition

dov:additionalProperties.description: use 'dov:additionalProperties' to indicate a map type and specify the data schema for the values therein

dtv:additionalProperties.description: use 'dtv:additionalProperties' to indicate a map type and specify the data schema for the values therein

dov:typeRef.description: opaque reference to another type definition (not necessarily in WoT) that is congruent to this array definition

aov:typeRef.description: opaque reference to another type definition (not necessarily in WoT) that is congruent to this array definition

items.description: use 'items' to specify the data schema for the values in the array

defaultSnippets.description: object type (3 example float properties, 2 required)
map type (example values are signed integers)

dov:ref.description: reference to an external schema definition to be used in place of an inline type definition

dtv:ref.description: reference to an external schema definition to be used in place of an inline type definition

defaultSnippets.description: reference to an external schema definition

dov:ref.description: reference to an external schema definition to be used in place of an inline type definition

dtv:ref.description: reference to an external schema definition to be used in place of an inline type definition

contentType.description: content type for communicated values, only 'application/json' supported at present

dov:topic.description: MQTT topic pattern -- slash-separated sequence of labels, each of which is a non-empty string of restricted characters or a brace-enclosed token

defaultSnippets.description: MQTT topic pattern used for publishes and subscribes

dtv:topic.description: MQTT topic pattern -- slash-separated sequence of labels, each of which is a non-empty string of restricted characters or a brace-enclosed token

defaultSnippets.description: MQTT topic pattern used for publishes and subscribes

not.description: serviceGroupId, headerCode, and headerInfo (dov: or dtv:) are not allowed in property forms

dov:serviceGroupId.description: string to use for shared subscriptions when receiving server-side action requests

dtv:serviceGroupId.description: string to use for shared subscriptions when receiving server-side action requests

dov:headerCode.description: reference to a key in the 'schemaDefinitions' property object, whose value is an object defining a string enum for a MQTT header value

dtv:headerCode.description: reference to a key in the 'schemaDefinitions' property object, whose value is an object defining a string enum for a MQTT header value

dov:headerInfo.description: schema for content embedded in a MQTT user header value

contentType.description: content type for data embedded in header info value, only 'application/json' supported at present

schema.description: reference to a key in the 'schemaDefinitions' property object

dtv:headerInfo.description: schema for content embedded in a MQTT user header value

contentType.description: content type for data embedded in header info value, only 'application/json' supported at present

schema.description: reference to a key in the 'schemaDefinitions' property object

dov:serviceGroupId.description: string to use for shared subscriptions when receiving client-side events

dtv:serviceGroupId.description: string to use for shared subscriptions when receiving client-side events

not.description: headerCode and headerInfo (dov: or dtv:) are not allowed in event forms

dov:serviceGroupId.description: string to use for shared subscriptions when receiving client-side events

dtv:serviceGroupId.description: string to use for shared subscriptions when receiving client-side events

not.description: headerCode and headerInfo (dov: or dtv:) are not allowed in root forms

dov:typeRef.description: opaque reference to another definition (not necessarily in WoT) that is congruent to this Thing Description definition

aov:typeRef.description: opaque reference to another definition (not necessarily in WoT) that is congruent to this Thing Description definition

dov:isComposite.description: true if the Thing Description represents a composite type

aov:isComposite.description: true if the Thing Description represents a composite type

dov:isEvent.description: true if the Thing Description represents an event type

aov:isEvent.description: true if the Thing Description represents an event type

dov:metadata.description: arbitrary metadata associated with this Thing Description

dov:propertyGroups.description: groups of related properties; each group object must have a distinct, non-empty 'title'

dov:actionGroups.description: groups of related actions; each group object must have a distinct, non-empty 'title'

dov:eventGroups.description: groups of related events; each group object must have a distinct, non-empty 'title'

schemaDefinitions.description: definitions of schemas that can be referenced via 'additionalResponses', 'dtv:headerCode', and 'dtv:headerInfo' properties in 'forms' elements

dov:errorMessage.description: name of a property whose value will hold an error message when this object is used as an error value

dtv:errorMessage.description: name of a property whose value will hold an error message when this object is used as an error value

links.description: links to other JSON files that can be either Thing Models or naming rules

dov:refType.description: custom reference type name, needed when 'rel' is 'aov:typedReference'

aov:refType.description: custom reference type name, needed when 'rel' is 'aov:typedReference'

type.description: naming rules must be written in JSON format
Thing Models must be written in JSON format

defaultSnippets.description: example naming 'links' value -- replace './EXAMPLE.SchemaNames.json' with path to your own schema names declaration file
example type 'links' value -- replace './EXAMPLE.SomeThingModel.TM.json' with path to a real Thing Model that is to be instanced
example root-level 'forms' values for interacting with all properties and events

properties.description: properties are values stored on a server that can be read or written by clients

readOnly.description: true if the property is read-only

dov:contains.description: list of names of other property affordances that this property logically contains

aov:contains.description: list of names of other property affordances that this property logically contains

dov:containedIn.description: name of another property affordance in which this property is logically contained

aov:containedIn.description: name of another property affordance in which this property is logically contained

dov:placeholder.description: true if the property is a placeholder for a dynamic collection of properties

dtv:placeholder.description: true if the property is a placeholder for a dynamic collection of properties

dov:memberOf.description: name of a group of properties to which this property belongs; the value must equal the 'title' of some element in the top-level 'dov:propertyGroups' array

aov:memberOf.description: name of a group of properties to which this property belongs; the value must equal the 'title' of some element in the top-level 'dov:propertyGroups' array

dov:propertyConfiguration.description: arbitrary configuration data associated with this property

actions.description: actions are round-trip messages initiated by clients to request a server to perform an operation and return the result to the client

input.description: input arguments as properties in object type

defaultSnippets.description: reference to an external schema definition (must be an object)

output.description: output values as properties in object type

defaultSnippets.description: reference to an external schema definition (must be an object)

idempotent.description: true if the action is idempotent

safe.description: true if caching the action's output is safe

dov:memberOf.description: name of a group of actions to which this action belongs; the value must equal the 'title' of some element in the top-level 'dov:actionGroups' array

aov:memberOf.description: name of a group of actions to which this action belongs; the value must equal the 'title' of some element in the top-level 'dov:actionGroups' array

dov:actionConfiguration.description: arbitrary configuration data associated with this action

events.description: events are one-way messages sent from servers to clients to indicate occurrences and status changes

data.description: the data schema of the event

dov:contains.description: list of names of other event affordances that this event logically contains

aov:contains.description: list of names of other event affordances that this event logically contains

dov:containedIn.description: name of another event affordance in which this event is logically contained

aov:containedIn.description: name of another event affordance in which this event is logically contained

dov:placeholder.description: true if the event is a placeholder for a dynamic collection of events

dtv:placeholder.description: true if the event is a placeholder for a dynamic collection of events

dov:memberOf.description: name of a group of events to which this event belongs; the value must equal the 'title' of some element in the top-level 'dov:eventGroups' array

aov:memberOf.description: name of a group of events to which this event belongs; the value must equal the 'title' of some element in the top-level 'dov:eventGroups' array

dov:eventConfiguration.description: arbitrary configuration data associated with this event
